# autohotkey-mcp — Full Reference

> FastMCP 3.2.4 | Python 3.12+ | Ports 10746/10747 | AHK depot: autohotkey-test

## What it does

Exposes AutoHotkey v2 scriptlet management as MCP tools. Connects to the
ScriptletCOMBridge (AHK HTTP server on 10744) when running, falls back to
direct depot scan + subprocess AHK launch. AI script generation uses FastMCP
sampling (host LLM, e.g. Claude via Cursor) as primary path; localhost HTTP
(Ollama/LM Studio) as fallback.

## Architecture

```
Claude Desktop / Cursor
    │  stdio (MCP)
    ▼
autohotkey-mcp (FastMCP 3.2)
    ├── MCP tools (scriptlets, generate, help, prefab cards)
    ├── MCP prompts (generate/refine/debug/migrate/review)
    ├── MCP resources (ahk://prompts/*)
    ├── SkillsDirectoryProvider (.cursor/skills/)
    │
    ├── FastAPI HTTP (10746)
    │   ├── /api/scriptlets, /api/running, /api/help
    │   ├── /api/generate_scriptlet, /api/chat, /api/refine_prompt
    │   ├── /api/scriptlet/:id, /api/run_scriptlet, /api/stop_scriptlet
    │   ├── /tool  (bridge: POST {name, arguments})
    │   └── /health, /status, /help (mini HTML)
    │
    └── Vite React SPA (10747)
        ├── Overview, Help, Chat, Scriptlets
        ├── Scriptlets/:id (detail + run/stop)
        ├── Running (live + kill)
        ├── Prefab Tools (invoke all 6 prefab tools)
        └── Status

ScriptletCOMBridge.ahk (10744)  ← autohotkey-test depot
    ├── GET /scriptlets  → JSON array
    ├── GET /run/:name   → start .ahk
    ├── GET /stop/:name  → stop .ahk
    └── GET /dashboard   → HTML UI
```

## MCP Tools (16)

### Scriptlet management
- **list_scriptlets()** — list all scriptlets (bridge or depot scan); returns id, name, description, category, running
- **run_scriptlet(script_id)** — run by id; bridge if up, else direct AHK + PID tracking
- **stop_scriptlet(script_id, pid?)** — stop by id; optional pid for multi-instance direct runs
- **list_running_scriptlets()** — live instances with hotkeys, description, PID, source
- **get_scriptlet_source(script_id)** — full .ahk source from depot
- **get_scriptlet_metadata(script_id)** — @key: value header fields

### AI generation
- **generate_scriptlet(prompt, filename?)** — sampling-first generate; fallback localhost HTTP; writes to ai_generated/ after validation only
- **refine_ahk_prompt(rough, persona_id?)** — turn vague idea into precise prompt; same sampling path
- **list_generation_prompts(category?)** — preset prompt catalog (ids, titles, tags)

### Help
- **ahk_help(level?, topic?)** — markdown help; levels: quick|reference|language|usage|tools|mcp_server
- **show_help()** — returns URLs for mini-help and webapp

### Prefab UI cards (app=True)
- **show_scriptlets_card()** — DataTable: all scriptlets, Dot status, Badge category, search+paginate
- **show_running_scriptlets_card()** — Dashboard KPIs (Metric) + DataTable of live instances
- **show_ahk_help_card(level)** — Tabs per help level + Markdown content
- **show_scriptlet_detail_card(script_id)** — Code block + Badge metadata + Kbd hotkeys
- **show_generation_result_card(script_id)** — generated script Code block + safety warning
- **show_server_status_card()** — Dashboard KPIs (bridge/exe status) + config DataTable

## MCP Prompts (5)

- **generate_ahk_scriptlet(description)** — full v2 generation system prompt with header requirements
- **refine_ahk_idea(rough_idea)** — sharpen vague request into precise spec
- **debug_ahk_script(source, error?)** — v1→v2 bug checklist + corrected output
- **migrate_v1_to_v2(v1_source)** — migration table + annotated v2 output
- **review_ahk_for_safety(source)** — RED/YELLOW/GREEN safety report + verdict

## MCP Resources

- **ahk://prompts/catalog** — full JSON array of preset prompts
- **ahk://prompts/categories** — list of category strings
- **ahk://prompts/{id}** — single preset or JSON error

## FastMCP 3.2 Features Used

- `@mcp.tool(app=True)` + `ToolResult` + `PrefabApp` → inline Prefab UI cards
- `@mcp.prompt()` → 5 conversation starters
- `@mcp.resource()` → prompt catalog resources
- `SkillsDirectoryProvider(roots=.cursor/skills/)` → AHK authoring skills
- `ctx.sample()` → sampling-first generation (temperature kwarg defensive)

## Environment Variables

| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| AUTOHOTKEY_SCRIPT_DEPOT | d:/dev/repos/autohotkey-test | Depot root (must contain scriptlets/) |
| AUTOHOTKEY_BRIDGE_URL | http://127.0.0.1:10744 | ScriptletCOMBridge base URL |
| AUTOHOTKEY_EXE | (auto-detect) | AHK v2 exe path |
| AUTOHOTKEY_MCP_HTTP | (auto) | 0 = force stdio-only |
| PORT | 10746 | Backend port |
| AUTOHOTKEY_LLM_BASE_URL | http://127.0.0.1:11434/v1 | Local LLM (Ollama/LM Studio) |
| AUTOHOTKEY_LLM_MODEL | llama3.2 | Model id |
| AUTOHOTKEY_LLM_API_KEY | (unset) | Optional bearer token |
| AUTOHOTKEY_LLM_TIMEOUT | 120 | HTTP timeout (seconds) |
| AUTOHOTKEY_PREFAB_APPS | 1 | 0 = disable prefab tool registration |
| AUTOHOTKEY_SKILLS_DIR | .cursor/skills | Override skills dir for SkillsDirectoryProvider |

## Start

```powershell
# Backend + SPA (opens browser)
.\web_sota\start.ps1

# Backend only (Cursor/MCP stdio auto-detected)
uv run autohotkey-mcp

# Just recipes
just --list
just run      # backend
just web      # backend + frontend
just lint
just test
```

## Cursor / Claude Desktop

```json
{
  "autohotkey-mcp": {
    "command": "uv",
    "args": ["--directory", "D:/Dev/repos/autohotkey-mcp", "run", "autohotkey-mcp"]
  }
}
```

## Health

```
GET http://127.0.0.1:10746/health
→ {"ok": true, "service": "autohotkey-mcp", "port": 10746}
```

## Related

- **autohotkey-test** — AHK scriptlet depot; ScriptletCOMBridge on 10744
- **pywinauto-mcp** — native Windows UI automation via UIA tree; complements AHK
